tasks.subject: DG-T1: isUnreconciledIdle predicate + DRAIN_DISK_RECOUNT flag (drainGuard.ts, TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure predicate detecting idle-but-unreconciled wedge + default-on kill-switch resolver, unit-tested.

**Files:** Modify crawler/src/drainGuard.ts + crawler/src/drainGuard.test.ts

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsx@4 --test src/drainGuard.test.ts (local tsc unavailable: empty node_modules, VM build authoritative)

tasks.subject: DG-T2: wire disk-confirm drain path into queue-stats interval (main.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** In the 30s interval, after the unchanged isDrainedSample fast-path, add the gated disk-confirm path: isUnreconciledIdle ~90s -> recountQueueFromDisk -> abort iff disk-drained.

**Files:** Modify crawler/src/main.ts (imports ~52-53; interval 736-776)

**Verify:** local tsc unavailable (empty node_modules); npx tsx@4 --test src/drainGuard.test.ts still green + diff review of in-scope symbols; VM Docker build = authoritative typecheck.
